proof:
unfold p0ProjectionResidualSq2 constApproxError2 cellAverage2
nlinarith [sq_nonneg (c - (u0 + u1) / 2), sq_nonneg (u0 - (u0 + u1) / 2), sq_nonneg (u1 - (u0 + u1) / 2)]

unfold weightedP0Average
rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← mul_div_assoc]
congr 1
rw [Finset.mul_sum]
apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
intro i _
ring

unfold weightedP0Residual weightedP0Average
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
have h : ∑ i ∈ s, m i * ((∑ j ∈ s, m j * u j) / (∑ j ∈ s, m j)) = ∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i := by
  rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
  field_simp
rw [Finset.mul_sum.symm] at *
simp only [mul_sub]
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
rw [h]
ring

rw [abs_le] at hLeft hRight ⊢
obtain ⟨hwL, hwR⟩ := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
have hsum := laxFriedrichsWeights_sum cfl
constructor
· unfold laxFriedrichsStep
  have h1 : laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * (-M) ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft := by
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft.1 hwL
  have h2 : laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * (-M) ≤ laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight := by
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight.1 hwR
  nlinarith [h1, h2, hsum]
· unfold laxFriedrichsStep
  have h1 : laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * M := by
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft.2 hwL
  have h2 : laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight ≤ laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * M := by
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight.2 hwR
  nlinarith [h1, h2, hsum]

unfold weightedP0Average
simp only [← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hmass]

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0

unfold vec2InfNorm diag2First diag2Second
apply max_le
· rw [abs_mul]
  calc |a| * |x| ≤ rho * |x| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ha (abs_nonneg x)
    _ ≤ rho * max |x| |y| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_max_left _ _) hrho
· rw [abs_mul]
  calc |b| * |y| ≤ rho * |y| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hb (abs_nonneg y)
    _ ≤ rho * max |x| |y| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_max_right _ _) hrho

unfold finiteRowApply
simp only [← Finset.sum_mul, hsum, one_mul]

unfold finiteDC centeredSignal finiteMean finiteDC
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp
ring
